description.value:
A compact polearm-style blade combining a glaive's cutting edge with a sword's maneuverability. The short glaive enables mobile fighters to brace against charges, lunge forward, and disengage without opening themselves to counterattack.

Training

LevelProperties
UntrainedTwo-Handed, Finesse, Melee 2d4, Slashing
BasicTwo-Handed, Finesse, Melee 3d4, Balanced, Brace, Lunge
MasterTwo-Handed, Finesse, Melee 3d4, Balanced, Brace, Lunge â€” all bonuses apply
Master PerkWhen you take the Dash action, you do not provoke opportunity attacks and may make one attack at any point during your movement.

rmeData.masterPerk: When you take the Dash action, you do not provoke opportunity attacks and may make one attack at any point during your movement.
